metadata.title: ECI v7-note v0.1 — Empirical Bogomolny–Keating 2-point correction on 10⁵ Odlyzko zeros, and a no-go for log-type saturation envelopes
metadata.description: Short technical note (4 pages) reporting two independent small-scale results from a pre-registered testing pipeline for the ECI v6 differential generalised-second-law inequality. First: on the first 10⁵ non-trivial Riemann zeros of Odlyzko's public tables, the empirical pair correlation R_2^emp(x) deviates from the pure Montgomery–Dyson GUE prediction at χ² = 434.19 / 58 dof; the Bogomolny–Keating (1996) arithmetic 2-point correction accounts for this deviation with χ²/dof = 4.17 at best-fit amplitude A = 0.41 and effective height L_eff = 7.44, leaving a residual ν ≈ 1 oscillation most plausibly attributed to unfolding miscalibration rather than new structure, consistent with Odlyzko–Rudnick–Sarnak (1996) order-of-magnitude expectations. Second: in the Fan (2022) logarithmic Krylov scrambling regime, any saturation-envelope Φ(x) with Φ(1) ≠ 0 fails the boundary condition dS_gen/dτ_R → 0; a recent log-type envelope proposal Φ(x) ∝ log(1 + x/x*) is thus excluded, while the logistic Φ(x) = 1 − x of the v6.0.6 formal companion satisfies it. Both reported as technical notes — neither modifies the companion paper.
